V-M-039.checks: Session hardening gates must preserve login, verify-email activation, refresh, logout, role gates, and rollback while documenting the safe path to reduce fragile client-side token exposure.
V-M-039.test-files: scripts/session-security-smoke.mjs docs/security/SESSION-PHASE-25.xml frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx frontend/src/pages/VerifyEmail.tsx frontend/src/stores/auth.ts frontend/src/lib/api.ts frontend-admin/src/pages/Login.tsx frontend-admin/src/stores/auth.ts frontend-admin/src/lib/api.ts backend/app/users/router.py backend/app/core/security.py
V-M-039.commands: node scripts/session-security-smoke.mjs; cd frontend && npm run build; cd ../frontend-admin && npm run build; cd ../backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_security.py -v -k blacklist

module-checks.check-1: User login, pending register, verify-email token storage, refresh, logout, and 401 retry paths are tested.
module-checks.check-2: Admin login, refresh, logout, and role-gate paths are tested.
module-checks.check-3: Browser storage behavior is explicitly verified before migration and documented as rollback-compatible residual risk.
module-checks.check-4: Rollback path is documented before execution.
module-checks.check-5: Admin refresh token is persisted at login and removed on logout/setToken(null) so existing 401 retry behavior is not dead code.
module-checks.check-6: Pending register does not store access or refresh tokens before verified email activation.

scenarios.scenario-1: User and admin sessions survive normal refresh behavior and fail safely after logout.
scenarios.scenario-2: Session migration breaks Telegram auth, admin role checks, refresh retry, or logout cleanup.
scenarios.scenario-3: Cookie-only migration claims completion while tokens remain exposed in browser storage.
scenarios.scenario-4: Admin login succeeds but the refresh retry path cannot run because admin_refresh_token was never stored.

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-10: scripts/session-security-smoke.mjs added for static Phase-25 auth guardrails and required log markers.
evidence.evidence-2: 2026-05-10: docs/security/SESSION-PHASE-25.xml records audit, migration order, rollback, local gates, and operator-required live conditions.
evidence.evidence-3: 2026-05-10: frontend-admin login now stores admin_refresh_token and auth store clears it with admin_token on logout/setToken(null).
evidence.evidence-4: 2026-05-10: node scripts/session-security-smoke.mjs passed with USER_SMOKE_PASS and ADMIN_SMOKE_PASS markers.
evidence.evidence-5: 2026-05-10: cd frontend && npm run build passed; cd frontend-admin && npm run build passed.
evidence.evidence-6: 2026-05-10: cd backend && ... tests/test_security.py -v -k blacklist passed, 2 selected tests.
evidence.evidence-7: 2026-05-13: node scripts/session-security-smoke.mjs passed after Phase-28 update requiring Register to avoid token storage and VerifyEmail to store tokens only after ownership proof.
